channel.title: Telegram on Xizi's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Telegram on Xizi's Blog

item.title: Telegram解锁+86聊天,加机器人spambot进行解锁.
item.description: Telegram Sorry, you can only send messages to mutual contacts at the moment. MORE INFO OK Telegram 抱歉，您目前只能向相互的联系人发送消息。 更多信息 好的 @SpamBot发送/start Q: Good news, no limits are currently applied to your account. You’re free as a bird! But I can’t message non-contacts! Great. First, please confirm that you will never send this to strangers: - Unsolicited advertising of any kind - Promotional messages - Shocking materials Were you going to do anything like that? A: No, I’ll never do any of this! Q: Great! I’m very sorry if
